name: ai-chat-teacher-api
description: Ai Chat Teacher API built with Express + TypeScript + Drizzle + Postgres.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test:integration: cross-env RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env ./node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate && cross-env RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --test-reporter spec --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.integration.spec.ts"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env ./node_modules/.bin/drizzle-kit migrate && cross-env RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true NODE_ENV=test node --env-file=.env --import tsx --test --test-force-exit --experimental-test-coverage --test-concurrency=1 "src/**/*.spec.ts"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
